category_sources: source_facts.description says it implements djb's redo as an alternative to make; official README calls it a recursive build system.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is redo; official ReadTheDocs and GitHub README use redo.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to documentation at redo.rtfd.io, which redirects to ReadTheDocs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/apenwarr/redo; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions make alternative; official GitHub topics include makefile, build-automation, parallel, build-system, djb, dependency.
